overview: Premium B2B corporate website for RPM Packaging Industries — an ISO 9001:2015 certified packaging manufacturer based in Jhajjar, Haryana, India, established in 2004. The site showcases corrugated boxes, custom packaging, and die-cut products while capturing B2B leads via quote forms and WhatsApp integration.
features: Sticky navigation header with mobile hamburger menu
Hero section with dual CTAs: Get Quote and Call Now
Product catalog with 8 product types and modal detail view
About Us page with company story, ISO certifications, and leadership profile
Contact form with Motoko backend lead capture
Portfolio page with 40+ national and international client logos
Quote popup modal on all pages
Google Maps embed for facility location
Smooth scroll animations and product card hover effects
Trust badges: ISO Certified, Quality Checked, Made in India
